planetsim

run_sim Functions

Functions to simulate an exoplanet transit.

class run_sim.Constants

Class for astronomical constants used in this simualtion

G

gravitational constant (m^3 kg^-1 s^-2)

Type:

float

msun

solar mass (kg)

Type:

float

rsun

solar radius (m)

Type:

float

class run_sim.Planet(radius, orbital_period)

Class for planet objects

radius

planet radius (meters)

Type:

float

orbital_period

planet orbital period (seconds)

Type:

float

class run_sim.Star(radius, mass)

Class for star objects

radius

star radius (meters)

Type:

float

mass

star mass (kg)

Type:

float

class run_sim.Transit(planet, star)

Class for transit objects

planet

object created from planet class

Type:

class

star

object created from star class

Type:

class

make_animation()

Create animation

Create animation of system as planet follows its orbit

Parameters:

None

Returns:

None

make_lightcurve()

Generate the transit lightcurve with batman

Inputs:

None

Returns:

None

make_snapshot(x)

Create snapshot Create snapshot of system given planet position using matplotlib

Parameters:

x (int) – horizontal position of planet relative to star

Returns:

None
